requirement_topic.en: ARENE / EDM Grid Connection for BESS — 50 Hz System, IEC 62933, and Project-Specific Connection Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: ARENE / EDM BESS并网——50 Hz系统、IEC 62933及项目专属并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: ARENE / EDM BESS併網——50 Hz系統、IEC 62933及項目專屬併網要求

summary.en: ARENE (Autoridade Reguladora de Energia) is Mozambique's energy regulator responsible for licensing energy producers and grid-connected storage operators. EDM (Electricidade de Moçambique) is the national utility and transmission/distribution system operator. All grid-connected BESS installations — utility-scale, mini-grid, and behind-the-meter — require ARENE project licensing and EDM grid-connection approval. Mozambique's grid operates at 220/380 V, 50 Hz — the same nominal voltage and frequency as China, which means the core voltage compatibility barrier present in many export markets is not a primary concern. However, EDM grid-connection technical requirements and protection relay settings for BESS power conversion systems (PCS) must be confirmed directly with EDM for each project, as no publicly accessible EDM technical specification specifically for BESS grid connection has been confirmed from official sources as of the dataset date. For donor-funded and IPP projects, lender technical specifications (World Bank, AfDB, etc.) will typically reference IEC 62933 series standards including IEC 62933-5-2 and IEC 62933-2-1. Mozambique's low electrification rate and large off-grid/mini-grid pipeline (FUNAE — Fundo de Energia) means a significant share of BESS deployments will be in off-grid or mini-grid configurations where EDM formal grid-connection approval may not apply but donor and lender technical specifications remain relevant.
summary.zh: ARENE（能源监管局）是莫桑比克的能源监管机构，负责颁发能源生产商和并网储能运营商许可证。EDM（莫桑比克电力公司）是国家电力公司及输配电系统运营商。所有并网BESS装置——包括公用事业规模、微型电网和表后项目——均须取得ARENE项目许可和EDM并网批准。莫桑比克电网运行参数为220/380 V、50 Hz——与中国额定电压和频率相同，这意味着许多出口市场存在的核心电压兼容性障碍在此不是主要问题。然而，针对每个项目，BESS储能变流器（PCS）的EDM并网技术要求和保护继电器参数须直接向EDM确认，因为截至本数据集日期，尚未从官方来源确认EDM公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格。对于捐赠方资助和IPP项目，贷款方技术规格（世界银行、非洲开发银行等）通常将引用IEC 62933系列标准，包括IEC 62933-5-2和IEC 62933-2-1。莫桑比克低电气化率和大型离网/微型电网项目管线（FUNAE——能源基金）意味着相当比例的BESS部署将采用离网或微型电网配置，在此情况下EDM正式并网批准可能不适用，但捐赠方和贷款方技术规格仍然相关。
summary.zht: ARENE（能源監管局）是莫三比克的能源監管機構，負責頒發能源生產商和併網儲能運營商許可證。EDM（莫三比克電力公司）是國家電力公司及輸配電系統運營商。所有併網BESS裝置——包括公用事業規模、微型電網和表後項目——均須取得ARENE項目許可和EDM併網批准。莫三比克電網運行參數為220/380 V、50 Hz——與中國額定電壓和頻率相同，這意味著許多出口市場存在的核心電壓兼容性障礙在此不是主要問題。然而，針對每個項目，BESS儲能變流器（PCS）的EDM併網技術要求和保護繼電器參數須直接向EDM確認，因為截至本數據集日期，尚未從官方來源確認EDM公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格。對於捐贈方資助和IPP項目，貸款方技術規格（世界銀行、非洲開發銀行等）通常將引用IEC 62933系列標準，包括IEC 62933-5-2和IEC 62933-2-1。莫三比克低電氣化率和大型離網/微型電網項目管線（FUNAE——能源基金）意味著相當比例的BESS部署將採用離網或微型電網配置，在此情況下EDM正式併網批准可能不適用，但捐贈方和貸款方技術規格仍然相關。

standards_or_laws: ARENE (Autoridade Reguladora de Energia) — energy licensing authority for grid-connected generation and storage in Mozambique
EDM (Electricidade de Moçambique) — national utility and grid operator; grid-connection approval required for BESS connected to the EDM network
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected donor/lender project-specification reference)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected donor/lender project-specification reference)
FUNAE (Fundo de Energia) — off-grid and mini-grid energy fund; project-specific technical specifications apply to FUNAE-procured BESS

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V — the same nominal voltage and frequency as Mozambique. Unlike many other export markets, voltage re-parameterisation of the PCS is not a primary requirement; however, specific EDM protection relay settings, SCADA communication protocols, and any project-specific connection agreement terms still require direct EDM engagement.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2023（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V——与莫桑比克额定电压和频率相同。与许多其他出口市场不同，PCS电压重新参数配置不是主要要求；但EDM专属保护继电器参数、SCADA通信协议及任何项目专属并网协议条款仍需直接与EDM接触确认。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2023（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V——與莫三比克額定電壓和頻率相同。與許多其他出口市場不同，PCS電壓重新參數配置不是主要要求；但EDM專屬保護繼電器參數、SCADA通訊協議及任何項目專屬併網協議條款仍需直接與EDM接觸確認。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy ARENE licensing or EDM grid-connection requirements. Key points requiring attention: (a) grid voltage parity — Mozambique operates at 220/380 V 50 Hz, identical to China's nominal grid parameters, so PCS voltage compatibility is not a primary gap; however, project-specific protection relay settings (under-/over-voltage, under-/over-frequency thresholds, anti-islanding, reactive power requirements) must be confirmed with EDM before commissioning; (b) ARENE licensing — an ARENE energy production or storage licence is required for grid-connected BESS; the application procedure should be confirmed directly with ARENE; (c) IEC 62933 series compliance — donor and lender project specifications for Mozambique BESS projects typically reference IEC 62933-2-1 and IEC 62933-5-2; Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (d) off-grid and mini-grid projects under FUNAE — EDM formal grid-connection approval may not apply, but FUNAE and donor/lender technical specifications govern and should be confirmed at the earliest project stage; (e) no publicly accessible EDM technical specification specifically for BESS grid connection has been confirmed as of the dataset date — direct EDM engagement is essential.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足ARENE许可或EDM并网要求。需注意的要点：（a）电网电压一致性——莫桑比克电网运行参数220/380 V 50 Hz与中国额定电网参数相同，PCS电压兼容性不是主要差距；但项目专属保护继电器参数（欠/过电压、欠/过频率阈值、防孤岛、无功功率要求）须在调试前与EDM确认；（b）ARENE许可——并网BESS须持有ARENE能源生产或储能许可证；申请程序应直接向ARENE确认；（c）IEC 62933系列合规——莫桑比克BESS项目的捐赠方和贷款方项目规格通常引用IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2；中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（d）FUNAE离网和微型电网项目——EDM正式并网批准可能不适用，但FUNAE和捐赠方/贷款方技术规格适用，应在项目最早阶段确认；（e）截至本数据集日期，尚未确认EDM公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格——直接与EDM接触至关重要。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足ARENE許可或EDM併網要求。需注意的要點：（a）電網電壓一致性——莫三比克電網運行參數220/380 V 50 Hz與中國額定電網參數相同，PCS電壓兼容性不是主要差距；但項目專屬保護繼電器參數（欠/過電壓、欠/過頻率閾值、防孤島、無功功率要求）須在調試前與EDM確認；（b）ARENE許可——併網BESS須持有ARENE能源生產或儲能許可證；申請程序應直接向ARENE確認；（c）IEC 62933系列合規——莫三比克BESS項目的捐贈方和貸款方項目規格通常引用IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2；中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（d）FUNAE離網和微型電網項目——EDM正式併網批准可能不適用，但FUNAE和捐贈方/貸款方技術規格適用，應在項目最早階段確認；（e）截至本數據集日期，尚未確認EDM公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格——直接與EDM接觸至關重要。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ARENE licensing and EDM grid-connection approval are required for all grid-connected BESS in Mozambique; specific BESS technical requirements are project-specific and must be obtained directly from ARENE and EDM; off-grid/mini-grid projects under FUNAE are governed by donor/lender specifications
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Mozambique

source.publisher: ARENE (Autoridade Reguladora de Energia) — Mozambique Energy Regulatory Authority

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy Mozambique's ARENE licensing or EDM grid-connection requirements. Mozambique's 220/380 V 50 Hz grid is nominally voltage-compatible with Chinese BESS PCS, reducing one common re-engineering gap; however, EDM project-specific protection settings, ARENE licensing, and donor/lender IEC 62933 evidence requirements remain. Engage ARENE and EDM at the earliest project stage to determine licensing, connection agreement technical requirements, and applicable IEC 62933 evidence. No publicly accessible EDM technical specification for BESS grid connection has been confirmed as of the dataset date — direct engagement is essential before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足莫桑比克ARENE许可或EDM并网要求。莫桑比克220/380 V 50 Hz电网名义上与中国BESS储能变流器电压兼容，减少了一个常见的重新工程差距；但EDM项目专属保护参数、ARENE许可及捐赠方/贷款方IEC 62933证据要求仍然存在。应在项目最早阶段与ARENE和EDM接触，确定许可要求、并网协议技术要求及适用IEC 62933证据。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认EDM公开发布针对BESS并网的技术规格——在设备采购最终确定前，直接接触至关重要。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足莫三比克ARENE許可或EDM併網要求。莫三比克220/380 V 50 Hz電網名義上與中國BESS儲能變流器電壓兼容，減少了一個常見的重新工程差距；但EDM項目專屬保護參數、ARENE許可及捐贈方/貸款方IEC 62933證據要求仍然存在。應在項目最早階段與ARENE和EDM接觸，確定許可要求、併網協議技術要求及適用IEC 62933證據。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認EDM公開發布針對BESS併網的技術規格——在設備採購最終確定前，直接接觸至關重要。
